name: Codespace Network
description: Configures Codespace networking for DDEV WordPress projects. Supports GitHub port forwarding and Cloudflare named tunnels.

mode.description: Networking mode: 'github' for port forwarding, 'cloudflare' for named tunnels

hosts.description: Comma-separated key=hostname pairs for tunnel mode (e.g. 'main=myproject.cs.genero-dev.com,fi=fi-myproject.cs.genero-dev.com')

ddevHosts.description: Comma-separated key=ddev-hostname pairs for multisite subsites (e.g. 'fi=fi.myproject.ddev.site'). Main site uses ddevDomain.

repo.description: GitHub repo for production snapshot downloads (e.g. 'generoi/btbtransformers'). Defaults to $GITHUB_REPOSITORY.
